segments.text: Um, the ledge getup is really tight
segments.original_text: あの、崖上がりがやっぱめっちゃきついです

segments.text: And the ledge getup is weak too
segments.original_text: 崖上がりがやっぱり弱いっていうのも
このキャラクターとしても

segments.text: Everything's already kind of being handled overall, you know
segments.original_text: なんか全部もう全体的にかなりケアされてるというか

full_text: Um, the ledge getup is really tight. And the ledge getup is weak too. For this character as well. Everything's already kind of being handled overall, you know. Yeah, exactly

corrections.original: ブレイブもトレも絶対的にかなり冷空されてる
corrections.corrected: 全部もう全体的にかなりケアされてる
